policy_text: The bank outsourced IT services without conducting vendor audits.
All outsourced IT vendors are audited annually by the bank.
The bank outsourced data processing activities but did not review vendor security controls.
Vendor audits are conducted only once during onboarding.
The bank performs periodic risk assessments and audits of all IT vendors.
Critical IT services were outsourced without any internal approval process.
Outsourced IT services are governed by formal contracts and internal approvals.
The bank failed to monitor vendor performance after outsourcing IT operations.
Vendor performance is continuously monitored using defined KPIs.
Sensitive customer data was shared with an IT vendor without access restrictions.
Access to customer data is restricted and logged for all IT vendors.
The bank outsourced cloud infrastructure management without evaluating security risks.
Security risks are evaluated before outsourcing cloud services.
The bank allowed vendors to subcontract IT services without oversight.
Vendor subcontracting is permitted only with prior approval and audits.
The bank did not maintain an inventory of outsourced IT activities.
A complete inventory of outsourced IT services is maintained and reviewed.
Audit findings for IT vendors were ignored by management.
Audit findings for vendors are reviewed and corrective actions are enforced.
The bank outsourced IT support but did not define incident response responsibilities.
Incident response roles are clearly defined in vendor contracts.
The bank failed to terminate vendor access after contract expiry.
Vendor access is revoked immediately after contract termination.
The bank outsourced IT operations without board oversight.
The board reviews and approves all material IT outsourcing decisions.
The bank did not conduct exit risk assessments for IT vendors.
Exit risk assessments are mandatory for all IT vendors.
IT vendors were allowed unrestricted system privileges.
System privileges for vendors follow least-privilege principles.
The bank outsourced IT services without documenting accountability.
